hero.title: Packers & Movers in Kerala
hero.subtitle: Kochi to Thiruvananthapuram, Kozhikode to Thrissur — 3,717+ verified movers across 12 cities in Kerala.

intro:
Kerala's dense population, high literacy and Gulf NRI-driven real estate market make it a unique relocation hub in South India. Radhe packers and movers connects you with 3,717+ verified movers across Kochi, Thiruvananthapuram, Kozhikode, Thrissur, Kollam, Kannur, Kottayam, Alappuzha, Palakkad and 3 more cities.

From Kochi's smart city expansion and marine drive apartments to Thiruvananthapuram's government quarters and the narrow lanes of Kozhikode's old port city, our KYC-verified vendors understand Kerala's backwater terrain and monsoon-season logistics.
whyUs: Kerala's heavy monsoon, waterway geography and the high value of NRI household goods shipped from abroad require experienced, insured movers. Our Kerala vendors use waterproof packing as standard, cover backwater-adjacent areas, and provide ₹5 lakh damage coverage with GPS tracking.

faqs.q: How much do packers and movers cost in Kerala?
faqs.a: Local 1 BHK moves within Kerala cities start at ₹4,500. Kochi to Thiruvananthapuram 2 BHK moves typically cost ₹9,000–₹16,000. Pricing includes standard packing.

faqs.q: Which cities in Kerala does Radhe packers and movers cover?
faqs.a: We cover 12 cities: Kochi, Thiruvananthapuram, Kozhikode, Thrissur, Kollam, Kannur, Kottayam, Alappuzha, Palakkad, Thalassery, Idukki and more.

faqs.q: Can you handle moves during Kerala's heavy monsoon season?
faqs.a: Yes. Waterproof packing is standard for all Kerala moves. We also monitor flood alerts and reroute if required during the June–August southwest monsoon.

faqs.q: Do you handle NRI household goods arriving from the Gulf?
faqs.a: Yes. We assist with customs clearance documentation, storage and final-mile delivery for household goods shipped from Gulf countries to Kerala ports and airports.
